agents.name: Rex
agents.note: Session 129 -- US-257 SHIPPED passes:true (Sprint 21 5/10 -- HDMI dashboard full-canvas redesign / B-052 RESOLVED).  Pure-geometry split: extracted src/pi/hardware/dashboard_layout.py (200 LOC, no pygame imports, DashboardLayout + Rect + FontScale dataclasses, ShutdownStage enum + STAGE_COLORS palette, computeLayout(w,h) factory).  4-quadrant layout (NW=engine / NE=power / SW=drive / SE=alerts + footer band).  Font sizes scale linearly in canvas height against a 1080-tall reference + clamp to a readable minimum so 480x320 still works.  StatusDisplay refactored: replaced linear y-offset render with quadrant render + added _shutdownStage data field + updateShutdownStage(stage) setter (accepts enum or case-insensitive string, unknown coerces to NORMAL) + NE quadrant background tints with 1/3-intensity stage color (NORMAL=black to avoid alarm fatigue).  Config: additive pi.display.displayCanvas.{width:1920,height:1080,mode:'auto'} + matching validator DEFAULTS; legacy pi.display.width/height unchanged for dev/test backwards compat.  Test surface: 27 tests in NEW test_dashboard_layout.py (parametrized over 1920x1080 / 1280x720 / 480x320; quadrants tile canvas-minus-footer with no gaps + no overlaps + no zero-dim quadrants; font hierarchy ordered title>=value>=label>=detail; stage colors distinct + RGB-valid; ValueError on non-positive dims) + 13 new TestCanvasSizeParameterization + TestShutdownStageUpdate tests in test_status_display.py exercising render path under fakePygame fixture.  ALL 51 layout/display tests pass + adjacent test_obd_config_loader (53 tests) + test_manager_status_display_disable pass (93 total).  ruff src/pi/hardware/ tests/pi/hardware/ src/common/config/validator.py = clean.  validate_config = OK.  sprint_lint = 0 errors / 21 sizing-cap warnings (informational per feedback_pm_sprint_contract_calibration).  FAST SUITE caveat: 3703 passed / 26 PRE-EXISTING failures (B-044 audit fingers scripts/seed_eclipse_vin.py:80,332,333 from commit 35e1374; Sprint-20 update + Sprint-19/20 server release/migration tests in files outside US-257 scope.filesToTouch).  GOTCHA RECORDED: ran 'git stash --keep-index' as a regression-isolation experiment mid-session; popped back cleanly via 'git stash pop' but lost ~5min on index.lock dance.  If you want to verify a regression is pre-existing, run pytest on a specific failing test file instead -- don't stash live work.  Discriminator: TestQuadrantGeometry::test_computeLayout_quadrantsTileTheCanvasBody[1920-1080] would fail pre-fix because there was no dashboard_layout module; TestShutdownStageUpdate::test_updateShutdownStage_acceptsEnum would fail pre-fix because StatusDisplay had no updateShutdownStage method.
